'''竏嗾h-y-f-f''' ('''kathayfefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lactate|lactate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lactate|lactate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾h-y-f-f
|-
! Lemma
| kathayfefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithayfefoko|thithayfefoko]] || [[word:jithayfefoko|jithayfefoko]] || [[word:shithayfefoko|shithayfefoko]] || [[word:kithayfefoko|kithayfefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthayfefoko|thuthuthayfefoko]] || [[word:jujuthayfefoko|jujuthayfefoko]] || [[word:shushuthayfefoko|shushuthayfefoko]] || [[word:kukuthayfefoko|kukuthayfefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthayfefoko|thuthayfefoko]] || [[word:juthayfefoko|juthayfefoko]] || [[word:shuthayfefoko|shuthayfefoko]] || [[word:kuthayfefoko|kuthayfefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthayfefoko|thuthayfefoko]] || [[word:juthayfefoko|juthayfefoko]] || [[word:shuthayfefoko|shuthayfefoko]] || [[word:kuthayfefoko|kuthayfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethayfefoko|thethayfefoko]] || [[word:jethayfefoko|jethayfefoko]] || [[word:shethayfefoko|shethayfefoko]] || [[word:kethayfefoko|kethayfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothayfefoko|thothothayfefoko]] || [[word:jojothayfefoko|jojothayfefoko]] || [[word:shoshothayfefoko|shoshothayfefoko]] || [[word:kokothayfefoko|kokothayfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothayfefoko|thothayfefoko]] || [[word:jothayfefoko|jothayfefoko]] || [[word:shothayfefoko|shothayfefoko]] || [[word:kothayfefoko|kothayfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothayfefoko|thothayfefoko]] || [[word:jothayfefoko|jothayfefoko]] || [[word:shothayfefoko|shothayfefoko]] || [[word:kothayfefoko|kothayfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦthayfefoko|thﾃｦthayfefoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦthayfefoko|jﾃｦthayfefoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦthayfefoko|shﾃｦthayfefoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦthayfefoko|kﾃｦthayfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathayfefoko|thathathayfefoko]] || [[word:jajathayfefoko|jajathayfefoko]] || [[word:shashathayfefoko|shashathayfefoko]] || [[word:kakathayfefoko|kakathayfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathayfefoko|thathayfefoko]] || [[word:jathayfefoko|jathayfefoko]] || [[word:shathayfefoko|shathayfefoko]] || [[word:kathayfefoko|kathayfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathayfefoko|thathayfefoko]] || [[word:jathayfefoko|jathayfefoko]] || [[word:shathayfefoko|shathayfefoko]] || [[word:kathayfefoko|kathayfefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathayfefithi|shathayfefithi]] || [[word:shathayfefiji|shathayfefiji]] || [[word:shathayfefishi|shathayfefishi]] || [[word:shathayfefiki|shathayfefiki]]

|-

|-

|}
